title: Americans Have Become Less Confident in Trump’s Decision-Making on Ukraine
summary_en: Republicans and Democrats still have differing views of the war in Ukraine, though their opinions of Russia and Putin are broadly negative.
title_cn: 美国人对特朗普涉乌克兰问题决策的信心有所下降

title: Catholicism has lost people to religious switching in many countries, while Protestantism has gained in some
categories: Pew Templeton Global Religious Futures Project
summary_en: Within Christianity, religious switching has affected the two largest subgroups, Catholicism and Protestantism, differently.
title_cn: 多国天主教因信众改宗出现人员流失 部分国家新教信众规模有所增长
